name: DLA Piper
description_short: DLA Piper is a global law firm with a New York office offering bankruptcy, restructuring, and financial services legal advice to corporate and institutional clients.
description_long:
DLA Piper LLP (US) is a multinational law firm with significant presence across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, and other regions. The firm maintains a major office in New York City at 1251 Avenue of the Americas, staffed by partners Sidney Burke and Jamie Knox as office managing partners. The firm serves institutional and corporate clients rather than individual consumers seeking personal bankruptcy protection.

DLA Piper's services relevant to bankruptcy and financial distress include restructuring, leveraged finance and debt finance, mergers and acquisitions, and financial services law. The firm handles complex commercial matters, private equity transactions, and institutional finance arrangements. Their practice areas span corporate law, tax structuring, litigation, and regulatory matters across multiple industries including healthcare, technology, and financial services.

The firm distinguishes itself through its global platform with offices in 40+ countries and specialized teams across practice areas. DLA Piper serves multinational corporations, investment firms, and institutional clients requiring coordinated legal services across jurisdictions. Their restructuring practice serves companies navigating financial challenges at the enterprise level rather than individual bankruptcy filers.

DLA Piper is a premium law firm positioned for high-net-worth individuals and corporations with complex financial situations. However, consumers seeking affordable personal bankruptcy filing assistance or Chapter 7/13 representation would need to seek specialized bankruptcy attorneys or legal aid services. This firm's cost structure and institutional focus make it unsuitable for typical individual bankruptcy cases.
pros: Global firm with 40+ country presence enabling multi-jurisdictional restructuring and finance work
Dedicated restructuring practice area explicitly listed as core service
Partners with specific expertise in leveraged finance and debt finance situations
Serves private equity and investment management clients with sophisticated financial matters
Offers international tax and structuring services alongside bankruptcy/restructuring advice
Multiple office locations including major financial centers for accessibility to institutional clients
cons: No indication of services for individual personal bankruptcy filers or Chapter 7/13 cases
Premium law firm pricing structure makes services inaccessible for consumers with limited budgets
Website provides no fee information, payment plans, or affordability options for any services
No mention of consumer bankruptcy education or financial counseling resources
Appears exclusively focused on corporate/institutional clients rather than individual debtors
best_for: Corporations and enterprises undergoing financial restructuring or debt refinancing
Investment firms and private equity companies managing portfolio company distress
Multinational corporations requiring cross-border bankruptcy or restructuring services
Financially sophisticated institutional clients with complex commercial debt situations
diagnosis: DLA Piper is best for corporations, investment firms, and institutional clients requiring sophisticated bankruptcy, restructuring, or financial services legal representation. The critical caveat is that this is a premium multinational law firm focused exclusively on institutional and corporate matters—it is not appropriate for individual consumers seeking personal bankruptcy protection, who should contact specialized bankruptcy attorneys, legal aid societies, or non-profit credit counseling services instead.
services: Leveraged finance and debt finance representation
Mergers and acquisitions during financial distress
Litigation and arbitration in financial matters
Data, privacy and cybersecurity (relevant to sensitive financial data)
meta_description: DLA Piper is a global law firm with a New York office offering bankruptcy, restructuring, and financial services legal advice.
